reach_why: Mostly extends familiar critiques of language-only discovery systems; little genuinely new explanatory territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links discovery limits, retrospective narrative bias, and evaluator norms of willingness versus restraint.
falsifiable_why: Compare verbal systems against measurement- and math-heavy discovery tasks; test whether narratives overstate genuine novelty.
explanation: Persuasive language can mimic discovery where real progress requires instruments, mathematics, or principled refusal.
